column1: Hey Connor, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Wordd thats where I'll be too. will be dope to have y'all there
how many ppl in your group so far?
word thats solid! which school you all from? all hook it up with a good group rate
Dope bro we got a bunch of Tennessee groups rollin with us
y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
we're thinking by the end of next week at the latest hoping for this weekend
Bet! I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
Is it cool if I send most of the info through email? It's a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if you got it
i'll look over it and shoot u a text tmr
yoo Connor whats good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
i'm talking with my roommates about it later tonight
aight bet if they want to get on a group call or anything just lmk
do you know what the dj lineups are going to be at both locations?
exact artists are tbd, at the occ punta cana we do bring a bunch of djs and throw beach/pool parties for you guys all week
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
we're thinking more on the punta one
i think that's the location we want to go
bet yea do u have the 5 night option by chance
My bad I missed this bro
I'll send you the pricing rn so you can check it out and then I'll make your reservation later on when we ready
ok bet, lmk when u send it over
yoo Connor how we feelin about that option?
it looks good we are getting a couple more people in the group and also looking at the cancun option
could we hop on a call later today to go over everything?
yea for sure bro. what time you thinkin
bet, just call me at this number
still good to go for that call
You avail now? I can call in 10
let me know when you send that email over
yooo whats up bro lmk if you got the reservation email
bet bet. any questions just text me
yoo whats good bro, were you guys able to hop on that res?
we are getting everyone joined through the res link today
aight bet. lmk if anyone needs any help
yerr whats good brotha, did y'all still plan on securing that? operations is asking about the rooms
yea were getting everyone booked and logged in rn
some of the kids just take a bit
should be all good by time
hey Spiffy anytime i go to the make a payment page it just loads and doesn't update the payment
Hey bro, could be a bug, mind screenshotting what you're seeing
yea i'm logged into my account and everything it just loads and i don't see a payment confirmation or me getting charged with anything
thats odd. ill check your account in a sec to make sure
i think it might just be me
okay yea I see you got through the customer agreement part a few times. so after that, is where you have the issue?
wanna make sure youre entering all card info correctly, zip code and all
yea im having the issue after the customer agreement
aight if you could give it one more try, if not I'll send you a separate direct payment link and have it applied to your account
if you could have another person in your group try as well. that way we know if its your specific account or not
we've had other groups make payments today so could be account specific or the card youre using possibly
let me know if there's any issues with it
also we had some buddies dropout so we got 8 right now so we only need to rooms
And I see your payment went through
i just saw we have 9 rn we're moving some pieces around and trying to get 3 more tonight, if not can we switch the room assignments around?
Yea will just have to switch to 3 rooms of 3
also is there a specific check in time or is it dependent upon flight arrival
Technically check in is at 3pm, but if you get there before they'll let you check in and get your bracelet so you can go eat/drink and chill until your rooms ready
They'll give you a time when you show up for when to go back to the front and get your room keys, and they'll hold onto your luggage and keep it safe til then
yoo any word from Peter or those 3 empty rooms? Operations is asking
we currently got 3 dudes that we might be able to get in to completely fill the rooms
word we lowkey needa know like today bro
word i'll get them on the horn rn
looks like we are just going to have 9
aight word all good. what do we want to do for room arrangement
whos the 3rd you want to add to your room
or did you want to keep it just you and andrew?
could i get moved to room 3 with John trevor and sam

yoyo I gotta know in like the next hour for the final arrangement. we gotta do rooms of 3. Right now its you trevor john james peter Matt brayden Andrew Sam worst case itll be locked in that way and you each can switch key cards after check in and arrange how you want to
will the balances update after this change is made?
so it would be the 779 per person instead of 684?
would we be able to add 2 more ppl in if they can pay writhing 24 hours?
if not no worries, also when do you need the new balance paid
hey bro, yea we can make it happen. they'll just have an hour window from when I open up the slots, to when they expires
so, lmk exactly when theyre ready and I'll it up right away for them to get in. also lmk if you want them added to the existing rooms or if they wanted their own new room of 2
hey spiffy i think those 2 guys are set and ready do you think we could open it up for them around 2pm est?
yea I got you. are we adding a new room or are we adding them to the existing rooms?
and could we switch the rooms to room 1 me trevor john and sam, room 2 peter matthew james and trace(signing up today), then room 3 as drew, brayden, trent (also signing up today)
its too late to switch around now bro
ok then just add trace and trent to room 1 and 2
y'all can rearrange after check in. just switch key cards with whoever
they are actually ready to go right now if u want to open it up
yea just put it in the ops team, waiting for it to open
ok bet, just let me know when it's open so i can relay the info
we also have one more so we can completely fill all 3 rooms of 4 if he can get in tonight
yo! the two are ready to go, will add the 3rd
did they want the 3 night party pass too?
they don't want the party pass rn
also it says that sam is in 2 rooms now
it also says he's in room 3
oh wait yea, why did he hop into a new spot?
bro just taking open spaces lolol
i don't know he said he logged into his account and it reserved him for the new spot lol
could u possibly fix it so that sergio can reserve the other spot?
nah he def went and clicked join trip on one of the new spots we just opened up
Ima clear it yea one sec
yo so sergio and kenneth dont want the party pass rn right
yea they don't want the party pass
kenneth said that his price still has the party package on it is there a way we could get his package taken off so it's just the base
all good now. any word on sergio
he said he was signing up right now
whats good broo. looking for flight info from a handful of the guys so we can set up your transportation from the airport
You Trev Sergio James Matt Brayden Kenneth
Ok, i just put my stuff in and relayed to the group, i know almost all of us are on the same flight
Also for me and john we don't see the vouchers for the party pass that we purchased
Yea vouchers aren't released until the reservation is up to date with flights, payments, etc
Just need everyone to get tightened up
who hasn't put there flight info in as of right now
ok thanks i'm about to get on them
yoyo we still need James and matthew to put their flight info in. do you know if theyre on the same flight as anyone else
yea they both are on the same flight as me Peter and Sam
Aight bet will add that in for them
bet, do we just download the vouchers as a pdf?
bet, where do me and john claim the party pass and how does that work

when you get off the shuttle to the airport our onsite staff will be there to greet you and help ou with check in. they will give you the details on where to go to redeem your party pass tickets/wristbands
